mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_near_miss_action_list ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_near_miss_action_list WHERE near_miss_id = #{nearMissId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_near_miss_action_list (near_miss_id, improvement_measures, improvement_measures_en, improvement_measures_zh, manage_dept, responsible_person, responsible_person_mail, responsible_person_company, plan_date, complete_date, created_at) VALUES (#{nearMissId}, #{improvementMeasures}, #{improvementMeasuresEn}, #{improvementMeasuresZh}, #{manageDept}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{responsiblePersonMail}, #{responsiblePersonCompany}, #{planDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{completeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_near_miss_action_list SET improvement_measures = #{improvementMeasures}, improvement_measures_en = #{improvementMeasuresEn}, improvement_measures_zh = #{improvementMeasuresZh}, manage_dept = #{manageDept}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, responsible_person_mail = #{responsiblePersonMail}, responsible_person_company = #{responsiblePersonCompany}, plan_date = #{planDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, complete_date = #{completeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE id = #{id}
